name: Speedtest Tracker
description: Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted internet performance tracking application that runs speedtest checks against Ookla's Speedtest service.

form_fields.label: Application Key
form_fields.hint: Generate an app key at https://speedtest-tracker.dev/

form_fields.label: Speedtest Servers (comma-separated IDs)
form_fields.hint: Convenient-to-you speedtest servers may be found at https://speedtest.net/speedtest-servers-static.php

author: alexjustesen
